Container.Name: Krusader
Container.Overview:
Krusader for Unraid – community edition, built on KasmVNC for a smooth, hardware-accelerated web desktop. Far snappier than the noVNC-based Krusader containers (binhex / jlesage / ich777).
What's pre-configured: • Breeze Dark theme for Krusader, Kate and KDE • Kate as Krusader's external editor • RAR support: right-click → "Extract RAR here" / "to subfolder" • 7z, ZIP, TAR, GZ, BZ2, XZ, LHA, ARJ, ACE, RPM, CPIO • Selectable UI language: 25 languages incl. German, English, French, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese (PT/BR), Dutch, Catalan, Basque, Irish, Danish, Swedish, Norwegian, Finnish, Icelandic, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Hungarian, Romanian, Slovenian, Croatian, Serbian, Bulgarian, Ukrainian, Russian, Greek, Turkish, Hebrew, Arabic, Japanese, Korean, Chinese (CN/TW) • Spell-checking in Kate for ~25 languages via Hunspell
Notes: • The /storage volume defaults to /mnt – this gives Krusader access to all shares (/mnt/user) and individual disks (/mnt/disk*). • Default WebUI port is 3000 (HTTP). 3001 (HTTPS) is also exposed if you prefer self-signed TLS. • PUID/PGID default to 99/100 (nobody/users on Unraid). • Auth: leave "KasmVNC Username" and "Password" EMPTY to run without login. Set both to enable HTTP-basic auth on the WebUI. Recommended whenever the container is reachable from anything beyond your LAN.
Container.Changes: ### 2026-05-09 - Initial Community Apps release - Breeze Dark by default via native KDE platform theme - 25 UI languages, dropdown-selectable - RAR support (extract here / to subfolder), 7z, ZIP, TAR, GZ, BZ2, XZ, LHA, ARJ, ACE, RPM, CPIO - Kate pre-wired as external editor - Optional KasmVNC HTTP-basic-auth

Config.Name: WebUI Port (HTTP / KasmVNC)
Config.Description: HTTP port of the KasmVNC WebUI. Open in any modern browser.

Config.Name: WebUI Port (HTTPS / KasmVNC)
Config.Description: HTTPS port of the KasmVNC WebUI (self-signed). Optional.

Config.Name: AppData (/config)
Config.Description: Persistent Krusader configs, history, bookmarks, default-files lock.

Config.Name: Storage (/storage)
Config.Description: Main path for file operations. Default /mnt gives access to all shares (/mnt/user) and individual disks (/mnt/disk*). Adjust if you only need specific shares.

Config.Name: UI Language (KRUSADER_LANG)
Config.Description: Language for the Krusader / Kate UI. 25 codes available: de, en, fr, es, it, pt, nl, ca, eu, ga, da, sv, nb, fi, is, pl, cs, sk, hu, ro, sl, hr, sr, bg, uk, ru, el, tr, he, ar, ja, ko, zh. Use 'system' for the container default. Re-applied on every container start.

Config.Name: KasmVNC Username
Config.Description: Optional. Username for HTTP-basic-auth on the WebUI. Leave EMPTY together with the password for no login. Set both fields to enable login (recommended outside trusted LANs).

Config.Name: KasmVNC Password
Config.Description: Optional. Password for HTTP-basic-auth on the WebUI. Leave EMPTY together with the username for no login. STRONGLY recommended whenever the container is reachable from outside your LAN.

Config.Name: Title (browser tab)
Config.Description: Title shown in browser tab and KasmVNC top bar.

Config.Name: Timezone (TZ)
Config.Description: Container timezone (affects log timestamps, file mtimes shown by Krusader).

Config.Name: User ID (PUID)
Config.Description: User-ID Krusader runs as. Default 99 (nobody on Unraid).

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: Permission mask for newly created files. Use 000 if you want every container user to read/write everything.
